01

Who I Am

I am a Bachelor of Computer Applications (BCA) graduate with a CGPA of 7.95, currently pursuing CA Intermediate. My passion lies in combining financial knowledge with artificial intelligence to build practical software solutions that simplify business processes and improve decision-making.

I believe the future belongs to professionals who understand both finance and technology. As a BCA graduate and CA Intermediate student, I enjoy exploring how Artificial Intelligence can transform accounting, financial reporting, business analytics, and enterprise workflows.

While my programming knowledge is currently focused on the fundamentals of Python, HTML, CSS, and JavaScript, I use modern AI-assisted development tools to transform ideas into functional products. My strengths lie in understanding business problems, designing solutions, coordinating AI-assisted development, and continuously learning new technologies.

"Technology should simplify business, not complicate it. My goal is to combine finance, automation, and artificial intelligence to create solutions that help people work smarter."

7.95

BCA CGPA

4+

02

What I Build

finamtrix-mvp.vercel.app
AI • FinTech

FinMatrix

An AI-powered financial statement generation platform that automates Balance Sheets, Profit & Loss Statements, Cash Flow Statements, and financial reporting through intelligent automation.

AI Finance Python Automation
Live Demo GitHub
maverick-os.dev
Flagship Project Currently Under Development

Maverick OS

A futuristic AI-powered desktop operating system and intelligent command center designed for productivity, automation, AI assistants, project management, and business workflows. This is my flagship concept project currently under active development.

AI Desktop Automation Productivity
indra-five.vercel.app
AI Analytics

INDRA

INDRA (Intelligent Network Data ROI Analysis) is an AI-driven analytics platform transforming business data into actionable insights through dashboards, ROI analysis, predictive reporting, and intelligent visualization.

Analytics AI Dashboard Business Intelligence
Live Demo GitHub
sjcreativelabs.vercel.app
Startup Website

SJ Creative Labs

A premium startup website showcasing software development, AI products, branding, digital transformation, and business solutions using a modern responsive interface.

HTML5 CSS3 JavaScript Responsive Design
Live Demo GitHub
murthy-co.vercel.app
Professional Client Project

Murthy & Co.

Designed and developed a professional website for Murthy & Co., a Tax Consultants and Income Tax Practitioners firm. The website presents taxation services, GST consultancy, accounting solutions, compliance support, financial advisory, and client communication through a modern responsive interface.

HTML5 CSS3 JavaScript Professional Website
